scripts.dev: rm -rf .next && NEXT_DISABLE_WEBPACK_CACHE=1 concurrently -n NEXT,ML -c blue,magenta "next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.setup:ml: python3.12 -m venv ml-service/.venv && ml-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r ml-service/requirements.txt && ml-service/.venv/bin/python ml-service/resolve_runtime.py --pip-bin ml-service/.venv/bin/pip --root-dir . --model-path deliverables/psych_screener_v3.joblib
